text:
and cents
 MEDICAID_MATCH_CNT_01 - 12 Monthly Medicaid beneficiary payment equaled the Medicare coinsurance and deductible for a service that occurred on the same day. 0 = Overlapping payments, but not a match
1-X=Count of services that match
Null/missing = Not applicable, no similar Medicaid services
 MEDICAID_OVRLP_CNT_01 - 12 Monthly Medicaid beneficiary payment was less than or equal to the Medicare coinsurance and deductible for a service that occurred on the same day. 0 = Medicaid
